ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code of the region (e.g., ACT) */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Australian Capital Territory) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code of the category (e.g., MH) */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Mental health) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the topic belongs to */,
  "topic_code" TEXT /* Code of the topic (e.g., MHC) */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., Mental health conditions) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "topic_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_code" TEXT /* Code of the indicator (e.g., AMC) */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., Any mental health condition) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., Per cent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "indicator_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the indicator */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., percentage, rate, count) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_code" TEXT /* Code of the age group (e.g., A05) */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 05 to 17) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 05 to 17) */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Start age of the range */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* End age of the range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_code" TEXT /* Code of the sex (e.g., Male) */,
  "sex_code_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviated code of the sex (e.g., M) */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Male) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collection */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the data */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic of the data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the indicator of the data */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the data */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the data */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the data (e.g., prevalence rate) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "ci_95_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "ci_95_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the result */,
  "relative_standard_error" REAL /* Relative standard error of the result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes on the data point */,
  "sex_indicator" TEXT /* Sex and indicator combined (e.g., Male _ Any mental health condition) */,
  "year_sex" TEXT /* Year and sex combined (e.g., 2018 Person) */,
  "sex_year" TEXT /* Sex and year combined (e.g., Person 2018) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_logins" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the record affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
